task_name: Add Human Gate Candidate Review Suite Coverage
goal: Add Human Gate Candidate checks to the shared Bluepilot review suite and document the new local review coverage.
claims: BP-054 adds Human Gate Candidate checks to the shared Bluepilot review suite.
BP-054 adds output invariant coverage that keeps approval_effect none, human_approval_recorded false, builder_task_create_allowed false, and builder_execute_allowed false.
BP-054 does not change Human Gate Candidate runtime behavior or fixtures.
assumptions: BP-053 already introduced the local Human Gate Candidate mock and golden fixtures.
Review suite coverage should remain the shared entry point for local reviewers.
Invariant tests are needed before expanding toward any real approval or Builder adapter handoff.
dod: tools/test-bluepilot-review-suite.cjs runs Human Gate Candidate syntax, fixtures, and invariant checks.
docs/BLUEPILOT_REVIEW_SUITE_v0.md mentions Human Gate Candidate coverage and limits.
stop_conditions: Human Gate Candidate runtime or fixture changes become necessary
Effective approval, live Builder, auth, secrets, DB, deploy, task create, execute, approve, or push becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-053 added a local Human Gate Candidate mock but did not yet wire it into the shared Bluepilot Review Suite.
